# Special Algorithms → Hermitian Matrix Determinant

*Auto-generated from CEVA-XC4500 Vec-C Intrinsics documentation*

---

Main table → Special Algorithms → Hermitian Matrix Determinant

Hermitian Matrix Determinant

Instruction Type and Width            Instruction description

Performs 2x2 Hermitian matrix determinant calculation. Each
Vector Hermitian Matrix Determinant
                                      source is 16-bit wide. The destination is 40-bit wide.
